change: Added import random. New params: extra_corpus, random_queries, random_corpus, seed. Query selection: rng.sample when random_queries+limit_queries else first N. Corpus selection: when extra_corpus set, build gold_doc_ids from queries_to_use; gold_rows + extra_rows (rng.sample when random_corpus else first X); warn if gold doc_id missing from corpus. CLI: --extra-corpus, --random-queries, --random-corpus, --seed.

CLI table: added --extra-corpus, --random-queries, --random-corpus, --seed; limit-corpus note 'Ignored when --extra-corpus is set'. Limit-queries section: How it works mentions random-queries; new bullet Reliable metrics with --extra-corpus X; Proper proportion (without --extra-corpus) with option to use --extra-corpus X first; Use full corpus or --extra-corpus when in doubt; new subsection Random sampling.

Added import json. test_pipeline_extra_corpus_gold_coverage: runs with limit_queries=1, extra_corpus=1, no limit_corpus; verifies completion. test_pipeline_random_queries_reproducible: runs twice with random_queries=True, limit_queries=2, seed=42, save_detailed_results=True; compares query_ids from benchmark_results_detailed.json; asserts ids1==ids2 and len(ids1)==2.
